architecture.summary: Sidebar-only restructure in sidebars.ts. No file moves or renames. New sidebar categories: Dashboard & Observability, Sync Deep Dives (under Integrations), Migration Guides (under Reference), Advanced Topics / Learning / Platform-Specific (under Guides). 10 new markdown files under docs/guides/dashboard/ for undocumented dashboard pages. Features.md trimmed from 605 to ~150 lines with link-outs.

integrations.summary: No external integrations. Changes are purely to Docusaurus sidebars.ts and markdown content files. Docusaurus build system validates all doc IDs and internal links automatically. No API changes.

ui-ux.summary: All new sidebar categories use collapsed:true to avoid overwhelming navigation. Features page trimmed to scannable summaries with Learn More links. Dashboard pages follow consistent structure (title, description, features, usage, related links). Cross-linking adds Related Pages sections for natural navigation between topics.

performance.summary: No performance implications. Adding items to sidebar has negligible build-time cost. 10 new markdown files (~150 lines each) add ~1500 lines total -- well within Docusaurus capabilities. No runtime changes.

security.summary: No security implications. Documentation-only changes. No code execution, no credentials, no user input handling. All content is static markdown rendered by Docusaurus.

edge-cases.summary: Edge cases: orphaned files may have invalid frontmatter (build will catch), duplicate doc IDs across sidebars (Docusaurus validates), features.md links to pages that may not have matching anchors (build link checker validates). Build verification (npm run build) is the quality gate for all edge cases.
